crossWireTxHashes._note: Cross-wires confirmed via on-chain getter calls 2026-05-07; tx hashes not captured because the deploy script's post-deploy invariant check race-conditioned on Base Sepolia RPC propagation delay and crashed before manifest write. All 4 setter calls succeeded — verified by reading `Registry.escrowPool/stakeBond/signatureVerifier` and `StakeBond.foundationReserveWallet` on-chain (deploy script bug to fix in a follow-on commit).

_testnet_notes.foundation_reserve_stub: FTNS token address used as foundation reserve wallet stub (passes MED-4 code.length>0 gate; on testnet the slash share accumulates passively at the FTNS contract — no drain function, no economic recovery, but slashing path is exercisable).
_testnet_notes.ratified_decisions: docs/2026-05-05-public-testnet-deploy-plan.md §9 (decision 1: fresh FTNS, not Mock; decision 2: deployer EOA where possible).
